<var>
$TP$ = $FNC-TOTALPRICE$
$FNC-COST$ = 4200; 3950; 11320; 26650; 65000
$FNC-PVP-COST$ = 1500; 1000; 3500; 10000; 40000
$FNC-DETECTION$ = 2; 4; 0
$FNC-PVP-DETECTION$ = 2; 0; 0
$FNC-UPGRADE$ = Soul Forge; Skull Centrifuge; Graveward; Apostle Of Hades
$FNC-UPGRADEICON$ = File:NecromancerLevel1.png; File:NecromancerLevel2.png; File:NecromancerLevel3.png; File:NecromancerLevel4.png
$NecDPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$Nec4DPS$ = (Damage * Max Hits) / Firerate
$UnitDPS$ = Damage / Firerate
$ExecDPS$ = (Damage / Tick) / Firerate
$CE$ = Total Price / DPS
$FNC-ROFBUG$ = Firerate
</var>
<div class="mobile-tabber"><tabber>
|-|Regular =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Necromancer Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Splash Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!Explosion Range
!Max Hits
!Projectile Speed
!Soul Meter
!Build Time
!Max Gravestones
!Gravestone Spawn Count
!Max Gravestone Level
!DPS<ref name="dps">DPS assumes only one enemy is hit and does not include unit DPS.<br/>For Level 4, DPS assumes all beams hit the same enemy and does not include unit DPS.</ref>
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|15
|N/A
|1.2
|23
|N/A
|1
|75
|105
|1.5
|3
|3
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|N/A
|1.1
|23
|N/A
|1
|75
|125
|1
|3
|3
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|30
|N/A
|1.1
|26
|N/A
|1
|75
|180
|1
|6
|3
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|45
|N/A
|0.8
|28
|N/A
|1
|60
|405
|0.8
|6
|3
|2
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|30
|500
|0.4
|36
|5
|3
|N/A
|1,620
|0.8
|9
|3
|3
|$Nec4DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Skeleton Stats
|-
!Gravestone Level
!Unit
!Health
!Defense
!Speed
!Damage
!Firerate
!Tick
!Range
!Detections
!DPS<ref name="unitdps">DPS does not include collision damage and assumes only one enemy is hit by an unit.<br/>For the [[Executioner Skeleton]], DPS is calculated as (Damage ÷ Tick) ÷ Firerate.</ref>
|-
|1
|[[Skeleton (Unit)|Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|4
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|1
|[[Sword Skeleton]]
|120
|N/A
|3.3
|25
|0.7
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|$UnitDPS$
|-
|1–2
|[[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]
|1,200
|N/A
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|Hidden
|N/A
|-
|2–3
|[[Skeleton Knight]]
|235
|15%
|3.3
|90
|0.7
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|$UnitDPS$
|-
|2–3
|[[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|2,000
|15%
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|3
|[[Executioner Skeleton]]
|3,000
|25%
|2
|75
|6
|0.1
|32
|Flying, Hidden
|$ExecDPS$
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="5" |Raise the Dead Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Cost
!Max Units<ref name="maxunit">Units when gravestones are fully placed down and upgraded.</ref>
!Combined Total Health<ref name="cth">Health for units with defense is calculated as Health × Defense.</ref>
!Combined DPS<ref name="cdps">DPS does not include collision damage and assumes only one enemy is hit by an unit.<br>For the [[Executioner Skeleton]], DPS is calculated as (Damage ÷ Tick) ÷ Firerate.</ref>
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|3x [[Skeleton]]
|270
|N/A
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|3x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|360
|105.93
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|1x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>5x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|1,800
|176.55
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|2x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>2x [[Sword Skeleton]]<br/>1x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>1x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|5,210
|197.74
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|1x [[Executioner Skeleton]]<br/>5x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>3x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|12,001
|760.43
|}
</div>
|-|PVP =
<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="16" |Necromancer Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Price
!Damage
!Splash Damage
!Firerate
!Range
!Explosion Range
!Max Hits
!Projectile Speed
!Soul Meter
!Build Time
!Max Gravestones
!Gravestone Spawn Count
!Max Gravestone Level
!DPS<ref name="dps"/>
!Cost Efficiency
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|10
|N/A
|1.508
|21
|N/A
|1
|50
|50
|1.5
|2
|2
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|12
|N/A
|1.208
|21
|N/A
|2
|50
|60
|1
|4
|2
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|12
|N/A
|1.208
|24
|N/A
|2
|50
|96
|1
|6
|3
|1
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|30
|N/A
|0.808
|26
|N/A
|2
|50
|450
|0.8
|6
|3
|2
|$NecDPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|20
|500
|0.408
|32
|4
|3
|N/A
|1,440
|0.8
|9
|3
|3
|$Nec4DPS$
|{{Money|$CE$}}
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="11" |Skeleton Stats
|-
!Gravestone Level
!Unit
!Health
!Defense
!Speed
!Damage
!Firerate
!Tick
!Range
!Detections
!DPS<ref name="unitdps"/>
|-
|1
|[[Skeleton (Unit)|Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|4
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|1-2
|[[Sword Skeleton]]
|90
|N/A
|3.5
|20
|0.808
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|$UnitDPS$
|-
|2
|[[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]
|1,200
|N/A
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|Hidden
|N/A
|-
|2-3
|[[Skeleton Knight]]
|250
|N/A
|3.5
|90
|0.658
|N/A
|6
|Hidden
|$UnitDPS$
|-
|3
|[[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|2,000
|15%
|3.5
|N/A
|N/A
|N/A
|2
|N/A
|N/A
|-
|3
|[[Executioner Skeleton]]
|3,000
|25%
|2
|75
|6.008
|0.1
|32
|Flying, Hidden
|$ExecDPS$
|}
</div>

<div class="overflow-box">
{| class="wikitable stats-table"
! colspan="5" |Raise the Dead Stats
|-
!Level
!Total Cost
!Max Units<ref name="maxunit"/>
!Combined Total Health<ref name="cth"/>
!Combined DPS<ref name="cdps"/>
|-
|0
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|2x [[Skeleton]]
|180
|N/A
|-
|1
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|4x [[Skeleton]]
|360
|N/A
|-
|2
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|3x [[Skeleton]]<br/>3x [[Sword Skeleton]]
|540
|74.25
|-
|3
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|1x [[Giant Skeleton (Unit)|Giant Skeleton]]<br/>4x [[Sword Skeleton]]<br/>1x [[Skeleton Knight]]
|1,810
|235.78
|-
|4
|{{Money|$TP$}}
|1x [[Executioner Skeleton]]<br/>6x [[Skeleton Knight]]<br/>2x [[Hallow Guard (Unit)|Hallow Guard]]
|9,850
|945.51
|}
</div>
</tabber></div>
